goal: Finish final governance hardening after 9.8 tranche.

remaining_steps.title: Uniform JSON output across all validators
remaining_steps.success_criteria: All governance validators emit the same machine-readable payload contract.

remaining_steps.title: Strict roadmap requirement in governance-check
scope: Fail strict mode when ROADMAP_MISSING for non-bootstrap repos
Keep warning behavior for bootstrap/minimal contexts only
remaining_steps.success_criteria: Lifecycle governance does not silently pass in production-like repos.

remaining_steps.title: Golden fixture tests for index/map builders
remaining_steps.success_criteria: Builder output drift is caught via snapshot/fixture tests.

remaining_steps.title: Governance event ledger
scope: validator for append-only and schema order
remaining_steps.success_criteria: Closeout and refresh events have durable machine-trace evidence.

remaining_steps.title: Final operator-flow docs
scope: new_slice_packet -> validate_slice_packet -> implement -> validate_slice_closeout -> governance-check -> release-check
